---
title: "rikdom portfolio report"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    grid:
      body-width: 1600px
      sidebar-width: 0px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 0rem
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --rk-paper: #F4EFE6;
    --rk-linen: #E9E2D4;
    --rk-stone: #B8AE9E;
    --rk-border-soft: #D9D1C1;
    --rk-graphite: #4A4239;
    --rk-ink: #1F1A14;
    --rk-fjord: #2C4A6B;
    --rk-moss: #5F6B3A;
    --rk-rust: #8A3A1F;
    --rk-amber: #B98A2C;

    --rk-bg: var(--rk-paper);
    --rk-surface: var(--rk-linen);
    --rk-text: var(--rk-ink);
    --rk-muted: var(--rk-graphite);
    --rk-border: var(--rk-stone);
    --rk-positive: var(--rk-moss);
    --rk-negative: var(--rk-rust);
    --rk-primary: var(--rk-fjord);

    /* Chart palette — distinct hues with good contrast on the active background.
       Light theme defaults; dark overrides live in the prefers-color-scheme block. */
    --rk-chart-1: #2C4A6B;
    --rk-chart-2: #8A3A1F;
    --rk-chart-3: #5F6B3A;
    --rk-chart-4: #B98A2C;
    --rk-chart-5: #6B4A8A;
    --rk-chart-6: #1F6B6B;
    --rk-chart-7: #4A4239;
    --rk-chart-8: #8A7A64;
    --rk-chart-axis: #B8AE9E;
    --rk-chart-line: var(--rk-chart-1);

    --rk-font-serif: "Iowan Old Style", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
    --rk-font-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    color-scheme: light;
  }

  body {
    background: var(--rk-bg);
    color: var(--rk-text);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  #quarto-document-content,
  body.fullcontent main.content,
  body main.content,
  .page-columns {
    max-width: 100% !important;
    width: 100% !important;
  }

  .page-columns { display: block !important; grid-template-columns: none !important; }

  body main.content {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 24px !important;
    grid-column: screen-start / screen-end !important;
  }

  .rk-app {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 32px 8px 64px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .rk-topbar {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 24px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rk-stone);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .rk-brand { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:2px; }
  .rk-wordmark {
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 144, 'SOFT' 50;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
  }
  .rk-brand-dot { width:6px; height:6px; background:var(--rk-fjord); border-radius:50%; display:inline-block; margin-left:2px; translate:0 -2px; }

  .rk-title {
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 1.75rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 48;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin: 8px 0 0;
  }

  .rk-subtitle {
    color: var(--rk-muted);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }

  .rk-chip-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; }

  .rk-chip {
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-stone);
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    border-radius: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .rk-grid-main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .rk-card {
    background: var(--rk-linen);
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-stone);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .rk-card-body { padding: 24px; }

  .rk-label {
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .rk-hero-value {
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 300;
    font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 144, 'SOFT' 50;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }

  .rk-signed {
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }

  .rk-positive { color: var(--rk-moss); }
  .rk-negative { color: var(--rk-rust); }

  .rk-chart-shell {
    margin-top: 18px;
    background: var(--rk-paper);
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 14px;
  }

  .rk-chart-meta {
    margin-top: 10px;
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px 20px;
  }
  .rk-chart-meta strong { color: var(--rk-ink); font-weight: 500; }

  .rk-kpi-grid { display: grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }

  .rk-kpi {
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-stone);
    background: var(--rk-linen);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .rk-kpi .value {
    margin-top: 8px;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 48;
    line-height: 1.1;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }

  .rk-period-strip {
    margin-top: 18px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 0;
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .rk-period {
    padding: 14px 16px;
    background: var(--rk-paper);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft);
  }
  .rk-period:last-child { border-right: 0; }

  .rk-period .name {
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  }

  .rk-period .value {
    margin-top: 6px;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
  }

  .rk-grid-mid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .rk-alloc { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
  .rk-alloc-title {
    margin: 4px 0 0;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
  }

  .rk-donut-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }

  .rk-donut {
    width: 104px;
    height: 104px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--rk-donut-gradient, var(--rk-border-soft));
    position: relative;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }
  .rk-donut::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--rk-linen);
    border: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft);
  }

  .rk-list { display: grid; gap: 8px; width: 100%; font-family: var(--rk-font-mono); }

  .rk-list-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  .rk-legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 0; display: inline-block; }

  .rk-list-row .name {
    min-width: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--rk-ink);
  }

  .rk-list-row .value { color: var(--rk-graphite); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

  .rk-holdings table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-family: var(--rk-font-serif);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }

  .rk-holdings th,
  .rk-holdings td {
    padding: 12px 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft);
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .rk-holdings thead th {
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    background: transparent;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rk-stone);
  }

  .rk-bar-track {
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: var(--rk-border-soft);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .rk-bar-fill {
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: var(--rk-fjord);
  }

  .rk-empty {
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    margin: 0;
  }

  .rk-footnote {
    margin-top: 14px;
    color: var(--rk-graphite);
    font-family: var(--rk-font-mono);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .rk-grid-mid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .rk-period-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .rk-period { border-right: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rk-border-soft); }
    .rk-period:last-child { border-bottom: 0; }
    .rk-donut-row { align-items: flex-start; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 760px) {
    .rk-grid-main { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }

  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root:not([data-theme="light"]) {
      --rk-paper: #14161A;
      --rk-linen: #1B1E23;
      --rk-stone: #2E3138;
      --rk-border-soft: #24272D;
      --rk-graphite: #B8B1A1;
      --rk-ink: #E8E3D8;
      --rk-fjord: #8AA9CE;
      --rk-moss: #9AAE6B;
      --rk-rust: #C9775A;
      --rk-amber: #D9B070;

      /* Lighter, more saturated chart hues so slices stay visible against the
         near-black surface; avoids near-black/near-white that would vanish. */
      --rk-chart-1: #8AA9CE;
      --rk-chart-2: #C9775A;
      --rk-chart-3: #9AAE6B;
      --rk-chart-4: #D9B070;
      --rk-chart-5: #B79BD9;
      --rk-chart-6: #6FBDBD;
      --rk-chart-7: #D8CDB6;
      --rk-chart-8: #8A7A64;
      --rk-chart-axis: #2E3138;
      --rk-chart-line: var(--rk-chart-1);
      color-scheme: dark;
    }
  }
</style>

<script src="report-data.js"></script>

<div id="rk-app" class="rk-app"></div>

<script>
  (() => {
    const payload = window.RIKDOM_REPORT_DATA || {};
    const profile = payload.profile || {};
    const sections = payload.sections || {};

    const timeline = (Array.isArray(sections.timeline) ? sections.timeline : [])
      .map((row) => ({
        timestamp: row && row.timestamp ? String(row.timestamp) : "",
        value: Number(row && row.portfolio_value_base)
      }))
      .filter((row) => Number.isFinite(row.value));

    timeline.sort((a, b) => {
      const aTs = Date.parse(a.timestamp || "");
      const bTs = Date.parse(b.timestamp || "");
      if (Number.isFinite(aTs) && Number.isFinite(bTs)) {
        return aTs - bTs;
      }
      return 0;
    });

    const currencySplit = sections.currency_split || {};
    const assetTypeBreakdown = sections.asset_type_breakdown || {};
    const geography = sections.geography || {};
    const topHoldings = sections.risk && Array.isArray(sections.risk.top_holdings)
      ? sections.risk.top_holdings
      : [];

    const normalizeCurrency = (value, fallback = "USD") => {
      const normalized = String(value || "").toUpperCase().trim();
      return /^[A-Z]{3}$/.test(normalized) ? normalized : fallback;
    };

    const baseCurrency = normalizeCurrency(profile.base_currency, "USD");
    const portfolioName = String(profile.display_name || "Portfolio");
    const country = String(profile.country || "N/A");
    const timezone = String(profile.timezone || "UTC");

    const app = document.getElementById("rk-app");
    if (!app) {
      return;
    }

    const sumValues = (obj) => Object.values(obj || {}).reduce((acc, raw) => {
      const value = Number(raw || 0);
      return acc + (Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0);
    }, 0);

    const totalFromSplit = sumValues(currencySplit);
    const latestValue = timeline.length ? timeline[timeline.length - 1].value : totalFromSplit;
    const previousValue = timeline.length > 1 ? timeline[timeline.length - 2].value : null;
    const firstValue = timeline.length ? timeline[0].value : null;

    const intervalChange = previousValue === null ? null : latestValue - previousValue;
    const intervalChangePct = previousValue && previousValue !== 0
      ? (latestValue - previousValue) / previousValue
      : null;
    const maxChange = firstValue === null ? null : latestValue - firstValue;
    const maxChangePct = firstValue && firstValue !== 0 ? (latestValue - firstValue) / firstValue : null;

    const maxValue = timeline.length ? Math.max(...timeline.map((point) => point.value)) : latestValue;
    const minValue = timeline.length ? Math.min(...timeline.map((point) => point.value)) : latestValue;

    const holdingsTotal = topHoldings.reduce((acc, item) => {
      const value = Number(item && item.amount);
      return acc + (Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0);
    }, 0);

    const largestHolding = topHoldings.length
      ? Number(topHoldings[0].amount || 0)
      : 0;
    const largestHoldingShare = latestValue > 0 ? largestHolding / latestValue : 0;

    const currencyEntries = Object.entries(currencySplit)
      .map(([name, raw]) => [name, Number(raw || 0)])
      .filter(([, value]) => Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
    const maxCurrencyShare = currencyEntries.length && totalFromSplit > 0
      ? currencyEntries[0][1] / totalFromSplit
      : 0;

    const dateLabel = (isoDate) => {
      if (!isoDate) return "n/a";
      const parsed = Date.parse(isoDate);
      if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) {
        return isoDate;
      }
      return new Date(parsed).toLocaleDateString(undefined, {
        year: "numeric",
        month: "short",
        day: "2-digit"
      });
    };

    const dateTimeLabel = (isoDate) => {
      if (!isoDate) return "n/a";
      const parsed = Date.parse(isoDate);
      if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) {
        return isoDate;
      }
      return new Date(parsed).toLocaleString(undefined, {
        year: "numeric",
        month: "short",
        day: "2-digit",
        hour: "2-digit",
        minute: "2-digit"
      });
    };

    const formatMoney = (value, currency) => {
      const amount = Number(value || 0);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        return "-";
      }
      try {
        return new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
          style: "currency",
          currency: currency || "USD",
          maximumFractionDigits: 2
        }).format(amount);
      } catch (_error) {
        return `${amount.toFixed(2)} ${currency || ""}`.trim();
      }
    };

    const formatMoneyCompact = (value, currency) => {
      const amount = Number(value || 0);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        return "-";
      }
      const abs = Math.abs(amount);
      let scaled = amount;
      let suffix = "";
      if (abs >= 1_000_000_000) {
        scaled = amount / 1_000_000_000;
        suffix = "B";
      } else if (abs >= 1_000_000) {
        scaled = amount / 1_000_000;
        suffix = "M";
      } else if (abs >= 1_000) {
        scaled = amount / 1_000;
        suffix = "K";
      }
      const decimals = Math.abs(scaled) >= 100 ? 0 : 1;
      const compact = new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
        maximumFractionDigits: decimals,
        minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      }).format(scaled);
      return `${compact}${suffix} ${currency || ""}`.trim();
    };

    const formatSignedMoney = (value, currency) => {
      const amount = Number(value || 0);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        return "-";
      }
      try {
        return new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
          style: "currency",
          currency: currency || "USD",
          maximumFractionDigits: 2,
          signDisplay: "exceptZero"
        }).format(amount);
      } catch (_error) {
        const prefix = amount > 0 ? "+" : "";
        return `${prefix}${formatMoney(amount, currency)}`;
      }
    };

    const formatPct = (value, digits = 2) => {
      const amount = Number(value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        return "-";
      }
      return `${(amount * 100).toFixed(digits)}%`;
    };

    const formatSignedPct = (value, digits = 2) => {
      const amount = Number(value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        return "-";
      }
      const sign = amount > 0 ? "+" : "";
      return `${sign}${(amount * 100).toFixed(digits)}%`;
    };

    const signClass = (value) => {
      const amount = Number(value || 0);
      if (!Number.isFinite(amount) || amount === 0) {
        return "";
      }
      return amount > 0 ? "rk-positive" : "rk-negative";
    };

    const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value || "")
      .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
      .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
      .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
      .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
      .replaceAll("'", "&#39;");

    // Chart palette is sourced from CSS variables so it tracks the active
    // theme (light/dark) — keeps slices and legends readable on either bg.
    const cssVar = (name, fallback) => {
      const value = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue(name).trim();
      return value || fallback;
    };
    const palette = [
      cssVar("--rk-chart-1", "#2C4A6B"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-2", "#8A3A1F"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-3", "#5F6B3A"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-4", "#B98A2C"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-5", "#6B4A8A"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-6", "#1F6B6B"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-7", "#4A4239"),
      cssVar("--rk-chart-8", "#8A7A64")
    ];
    const chartAxisColor = cssVar("--rk-chart-axis", "#B8AE9E");
    const chartLineColor = cssVar("--rk-chart-line", palette[0]);

    const renderTrendChart = () => {
      if (!timeline.length) {
        return '<p class="rk-empty">No timeline snapshots available.</p>';
      }

      const width = 920;
      const height = 250;
      const padX = 24;
      const padY = 22;
      const points = timeline.map((point, index) => {
        const x = padX + (index * (width - padX * 2)) / Math.max(timeline.length - 1, 1);
        const range = maxValue - minValue || 1;
        const y = height - padY - ((point.value - minValue) / range) * (height - padY * 2);
        return { x, y, value: point.value, timestamp: point.timestamp };
      });

      const line = points
        .map((point, index) => `${index === 0 ? "M" : "L"} ${point.x.toFixed(1)} ${point.y.toFixed(1)}`)
        .join(" ");
      const area = `${line} L ${points[points.length - 1].x.toFixed(1)} ${(height - padY).toFixed(1)} L ${points[0].x.toFixed(1)} ${(height - padY).toFixed(1)} Z`;

      const last = points[points.length - 1];
      const first = points[0];

      return `
        <svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" width="100%" role="img" aria-label="Portfolio evolution chart">
          <rect x="0" y="0" width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="transparent" />
          <line x1="${padX}" y1="${height - padY}" x2="${width - padX}" y2="${height - padY}" stroke="${chartAxisColor}" />
          <path d="${line}" fill="none" stroke="${chartLineColor}" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
          <circle cx="${last.x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${last.y.toFixed(1)}" r="3.5" fill="${chartLineColor}"></circle>
          <circle cx="${first.x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${first.y.toFixed(1)}" r="2.5" fill="${chartAxisColor}"></circle>
        </svg>
      `;
    };

    const renderAllocation = (title, data, currency) => {
      const entries = Object.entries(data || {})
        .map(([name, raw]) => [name, Number(raw || 0)])
        .filter(([, value]) => Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0)
        .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);

      if (!entries.length) {
        return `
          <article class="rk-card">
            <div class="rk-card-body rk-alloc">
              <div>
                <div class="rk-label">Breakdown</div>
                <h3 class="rk-alloc-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
              </div>
              <p class="rk-empty">No data available.</p>
            </div>
          </article>
        `;
      }

      const total = entries.reduce((acc, [, value]) => acc + value, 0);
      let cursor = 0;
      const segments = entries.map(([, value], index) => {
        const pct = total > 0 ? (value / total) * 100 : 0;
        const from = cursor;
        cursor += pct;
        const color = palette[index % palette.length];
        return `${color} ${from.toFixed(2)}% ${cursor.toFixed(2)}%`;
      });

      const rows = entries.map(([name, value], index) => {
        const color = palette[index % palette.length];
        const share = total > 0 ? value / total : 0;
        return `
          <div class="rk-list-row">
            <span class="rk-legend-dot" style="background:${color}"></span>
            <span class="name" title="${escapeHtml(name)}">${escapeHtml(name)}</span>
            <span class="value">${formatPct(share, 1)} · ${formatMoneyCompact(value, currency)}</span>
          </div>
        `;
      }).join("");

      return `
        <article class="rk-card">
          <div class="rk-card-body rk-alloc">
            <div>
              <div class="rk-label">Breakdown</div>
              <h3 class="rk-alloc-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="rk-donut-row">
              <div class="rk-donut" style="--rk-donut-gradient: conic-gradient(${segments.join(",")});"></div>
              <div class="rk-list">${rows}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
      `;
    };

    const renderHoldingsTable = () => {
      if (!topHoldings.length) {
        return '<p class="rk-empty">No holdings available.</p>';
      }

      const maxAmount = Math.max(...topHoldings.map((item) => Number(item.amount || 0)), 1);

      const rows = topHoldings.map((item) => {
        const amount = Number(item.amount || 0);
        const width = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (amount / maxAmount) * 100));
        const exposure = holdingsTotal > 0 ? amount / holdingsTotal : 0;
        const holdingCurrency = normalizeCurrency(item.currency, baseCurrency);
        const label = item.label || item.id || "unknown";

        return `
          <tr>
            <td title="${escapeHtml(label)}">${escapeHtml(label)}</td>
            <td>${formatMoney(amount, holdingCurrency)}</td>
            <td>${formatPct(exposure, 1)}</td>
            <td style="min-width:160px;">
              <div class="rk-bar-track"><div class="rk-bar-fill" style="width:${width.toFixed(1)}%"></div></div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        `;
      }).join("");

      return `
        <div class="rk-holdings">
          <table>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Holding</th>
                <th>Amount</th>
                <th>Share (Top List)</th>
                <th>Relative Size</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      `;
    };

    const timelineFirst = timeline.length ? timeline[0].timestamp : "";
    const timelineLast = timeline.length ? timeline[timeline.length - 1].timestamp : "";

    app.innerHTML = `
      <header class="rk-topbar">
        <div>
          <div class="rk-brand"><span class="rk-wordmark">rikdom</span><span class="rk-brand-dot"></span></div>
          <h1 class="rk-title">${escapeHtml(portfolioName)}</h1>
          <div class="rk-subtitle">Static portfolio report · base ${escapeHtml(baseCurrency)}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="rk-chip-row">
          <span class="rk-chip">Base ${escapeHtml(baseCurrency)}</span>
          <span class="rk-chip">Country ${escapeHtml(country)}</span>
          <span class="rk-chip">TZ ${escapeHtml(timezone)}</span>
        </div>
      </header>

      <section class="rk-grid-main">
        <article class="rk-card">
          <div class="rk-card-body">
            <div class="rk-label">Total amount</div>
            <div class="rk-hero-value">${formatMoney(latestValue, baseCurrency)}</div>
            <div class="rk-signed ${signClass(maxChange)}">
              ${maxChange === null ? "—" : `${formatSignedMoney(maxChange, baseCurrency)} (${formatSignedPct(maxChangePct)})`}
              <span style="color:var(--rk-graphite);font-weight:400;"> since first snapshot</span>
            </div>

            <div class="rk-period-strip">
              <div class="rk-period">
                <div class="name">Latest interval</div>
                <div class="value ${signClass(intervalChange)}">
                  ${intervalChange === null ? "—" : `${formatSignedMoney(intervalChange, baseCurrency)} (${formatSignedPct(intervalChangePct)})`}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="rk-period">
                <div class="name">Period min / max</div>
                <div class="value">${formatMoney(minValue, baseCurrency)} / ${formatMoney(maxValue, baseCurrency)}</div>
              </div>
              <div class="rk-period">
                <div class="name">Largest currency share</div>
                <div class="value">${formatPct(maxCurrencyShare, 1)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="rk-chart-shell">${renderTrendChart()}</div>
            <div class="rk-chart-meta">
              <span>Coverage <strong>${escapeHtml(dateLabel(timelineFirst))}</strong> to <strong>${escapeHtml(dateLabel(timelineLast))}</strong></span>
              <span>Snapshots <strong>${timeline.length}</strong></span>
              <span>Updated <strong>${escapeHtml(dateTimeLabel(timelineLast))}</strong></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>

        <aside class="rk-kpi-grid">
          <article class="rk-kpi">
            <div class="rk-label">Top holding concentration</div>
            <div class="value">${formatPct(largestHoldingShare, 1)}</div>
            <div class="rk-footnote">Largest holding relative to latest total value.</div>
          </article>
          <article class="rk-kpi">
            <div class="rk-label">Currencies tracked</div>
            <div class="value">${Object.keys(currencySplit || {}).length}</div>
            <div class="rk-footnote">From current holdings market values.</div>
          </article>
          <article class="rk-kpi">
            <div class="rk-label">Asset buckets</div>
            <div class="value">${Object.keys(assetTypeBreakdown || {}).length}</div>
            <div class="rk-footnote">Debt classes are grouped into debt_instrument.</div>
          </article>
          <article class="rk-kpi">
            <div class="rk-label">Top holdings listed</div>
            <div class="value">${topHoldings.length}</div>
            <div class="rk-footnote">Limited to report payload top list.</div>
          </article>
        </aside>
      </section>

      <section class="rk-grid-mid">
        ${renderAllocation("Currency split", currencySplit, baseCurrency)}
        ${renderAllocation("Asset type breakdown", assetTypeBreakdown, baseCurrency)}
        ${renderAllocation("Geography", geography, baseCurrency)}
      </section>

      <section class="rk-card">
        <div class="rk-card-body">
          <div class="rk-label">Holdings</div>
          <h2 class="rk-alloc-title" style="margin:4px 0 14px;">Top holdings</h2>
          ${renderHoldingsTable()}
          <p class="rk-footnote">
            Holdings use the amounts provided in the current payload. When holdings contain multiple currencies,
            each row preserves its own currency code.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>
    `;
  })();
</script>
```
